title: FinPocket marketing website with landing page and supporting pages

requirements.text: Implement a mobile-first, responsive marketing website for the FinPocket mobile application with the following pages and routes: Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, and FAQ.

quotes:
Pages Required:
Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, FAQ

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to each page route renders the correct page content: Home, Features, About, Privacy Policy, FAQ.
Navigation works on mobile and desktop (no broken links, no missing routes).
Layout is responsive and readable on small screens first, and scales cleanly to desktop widths.

requirements.text: Build the Home page as an app landing page with these sections and exact user-facing copy: (1) Hero: Title “FinPocket – Your Money. Your Device. Your Privacy.”; Subtitle “Track your income and expenses easily with a fast, offline, and secure personal finance app.”; CTA button labeled “Download (Coming Soon)”; include an app mockup placeholder image. (2) Why FinPocket bullets: “100% Private (No login, no cloud)”, “Works Offline”, “Fast and Simple”, “No Ads, No Tracking”. (3) Core Features bullets: “Quick income and expense entry”, “Custom categories”, “Monthly dashboard and summaries”, “Local device storage”, “First-time guided walkthrough”. (4) How It Works steps: “Step 1: Install the app”, “Step 2: Add your income and expenses”, “Step 3: View insights and manage your money”. (5) Privacy Highlight: “Your financial data never leaves your device.” (6) Future Features bullets: “Budget planning”, “Backup and restore”, “Export reports”, “App lock / PIN protection”. (7) Call to Action: “Download FinPocket – Coming Soon”.

quotes:
Home Page Sections:

1. Hero Section
Title: FinPocket – Your Money. Your Device. Your Privacy.
Subtitle: Track your income and expenses easily with a fast, offline, and secure personal finance app.
CTA Button: Download (Coming Soon)
...
Additional Requirements:
- App mockup placeholder image in hero section

acceptanceCriteria: Home page contains all 7 sections in the specified order.
All listed text matches exactly (punctuation and capitalization preserved).
Hero section displays an app mockup placeholder image alongside the hero copy on desktop and stacks appropriately on mobile.
CTA button is visibly disabled or non-navigating and clearly indicates “Coming Soon” (no broken external links).

requirements.text: Create the Features page that explains all core features in detail using simple icons and short descriptions for each feature: Quick income and expense entry, Custom categories, Monthly dashboard and summaries, Local device storage, First-time guided walkthrough.

quotes:
Features Page:
Explain all core features in detail with simple icons and short descriptions.

acceptanceCriteria: Features page includes one icon + short description block for each of the 5 core features listed by the user.
Icons are consistent in style and sized consistently across feature items.
Page remains mobile-first and uses a clean grid/list layout that adapts to desktop.

requirements.text: Create the About page with the provided positioning and mission copy: “FinPocket was built to provide a simple, secure, and private way to manage personal finances. The mission is to give users full control of their financial data without complexity or tracking.”

quotes:
About Page:
FinPocket was built to provide a simple, secure, and private way to manage personal finances. The mission is to give users full control of their financial data without complexity or tracking.

acceptanceCriteria: About page renders the provided copy verbatim in a readable, professional layout.
Page includes consistent header/nav and footer shared with the rest of the site.

requirements.text: Create the Privacy Policy page listing these statements clearly: No data collection; No account required; No cloud storage; All data stored locally on the user’s device; No third-party sharing.

quotes:
Privacy Policy Page:
- No data collection
- No account required
- No cloud storage
- All data stored locally on the user’s device
- No third-party sharing

acceptanceCriteria: Privacy Policy page displays all five bullet points exactly as provided.
Page is readable on mobile and uses consistent typography with the rest of the site.

requirements.text: Create the FAQ page with the provided Q&A items: “Do I need an account? No.”, “Does it work offline? Yes.”, “Is my data safe? Yes, stored locally.”, “Is the app free? Yes, basic features are free.”, “Are there ads? No.”

quotes:
FAQ Page:
- Do I need an account? No.
- Does it work offline? Yes.
- Is my data safe? Yes, stored locally.
- Is the app free? Yes, basic features are free.
- Are there ads? No.

acceptanceCriteria: FAQ page contains all five FAQ items with the exact question/answer text.
FAQ items are formatted for easy scanning (e.g., accordion or clearly separated sections) while remaining accessible on mobile.

requirements.text: Add a site-wide footer that appears on every page with links to Home, Features, About, Privacy, and FAQ; include copyright text “© 2026 FinPocket”; and include a contact email placeholder.

quotes:
Footer:
- Links: Home, Features, About, Privacy, FAQ
- Copyright: © 2026 FinPocket
- Contact email placeholder

acceptanceCriteria: Footer is visible on all pages and contains working internal links to the 5 pages.
Footer includes the exact copyright string “© 2026 FinPocket”.
Footer includes a visible contact email placeholder (not a real email unless provided by the user).

requirements.text: Apply the requested website style across all pages: clean, minimal, modern, professional startup-style layout; mobile-first responsive design; soft blue/green/white color theme; clean, modern fonts; fast loading.

quotes:
Website Style:
- Clean, minimal, modern design
- Mobile-first and responsive
- Professional startup-style layout
- Soft colors (blue/green/white theme)
- App landing page style

Additional Requirements:
- Fast loading
- Clean fonts

acceptanceCriteria: Site uses a consistent visual system (colors, spacing, typography) aligned with a soft blue/green/white palette.
All pages meet basic performance expectations (no unnecessary heavy assets; images optimized).
Typography is clean and readable across mobile and desktop.

requirements.text: Make the site SEO-friendly by using semantic HTML structure (headers, sections), per-page document titles, and appropriate meta descriptions matching each page’s content.
acceptanceCriteria: Each page sets a distinct, relevant document title (e.g., “FinPocket — Privacy Policy”).
Each page includes a meta description relevant to its content.
Pages use semantic headings (H1 present and meaningful; sections structured logically).

requirements.text: Add the required static image assets (generated) to the frontend and render them in the UI: the hero app mockup placeholder image and a consistent set of simple feature icons.

quotes: App mockup placeholder image in hero section
Explain all core features in detail with simple icons

acceptanceCriteria: Generated images exist under frontend/public/assets/generated and are referenced directly by the frontend (not served through the backend).
Home hero displays the generated app mockup image.
Features page uses the generated icon set for the feature list with consistent sizing and styling.

constraints: Do not edit files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui (compose these components instead).
Backend must remain a single Motoko actor; only introduce backend code if strictly necessary for the marketing site (not expected for this request).
nonGoals: Implementing actual app download functionality or app store deep links (CTA should remain “Coming Soon” unless the user provides links).
Implementing user accounts, logins, cloud sync, analytics, tracking, ads, or any data collection.
Building the FinPocket mobile app itself (this request is for the marketing website only).

required: Simple line icon for “Quick income and expense entry” (icon-quick-entry.dim_256x256.png)
Simple line icon for “Monthly dashboard and summaries” (icon-dashboard.dim_256x256.png)
Simple line icon for “Local device storage” (icon-local-storage.dim_256x256.png)
Simple line icon for “First-time guided walkthrough” (icon-walkthrough.dim_256x256.png)
